name: RutaAPI
description: Registers RutaAPI as a first-party OpenAI-compatible model gateway using RUTAAPI_API_KEY or a Plugin Setting.

env.description: Fallback RutaAPI API key used for model discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: RutaAPI API key
settings.description: RutaAPI API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to RUTAAPI_API_KEY.

providers.name: RutaAPI
providers.description: Runs RutaAPI chat models through Pi's OpenAI-compatible completions transport.
